top_lending_protocols.name: Aave V3
top_lending_protocols.description: Earn interest, borrow assets, and build applications
top_lending_protocols.methodology: Counts the tokens locked in the contracts to be used as collateral to borrow or to earn yield. Borrowed coins are not counted towards the TVL, so only the coins actually locked in the contracts are counted. There's multiple reasons behind this but one of the main ones is to avoid inflating the TVL through cycled lending.

top_lending_protocols.name: Morpho Blue
top_lending_protocols.description: Morpho Blue is a trustless and efficient lending primitive with permissionless market creation

top_lending_protocols.name: SparkLend
top_lending_protocols.description: SparkLend is a stablecoin lending market. Unlike other lending protocols where rates fluctuate based on utilization or loan size, SparkLend offers governance-defined rates that do not vary based on those factors. This is made possible by Spark’s Liquidity Layer (SLL), which supplies consistent stablecoin liquidity to the protocol

top_lending_protocols.name: JustLend V1
top_lending_protocols.description: JustLend is a TRON-powered coin market protocol aimed at establishing fund pools whose interest rates are determined by an algorithm based on the supply and demand of TRON assets.
hallmarks: TRX token price was increasing over 90%

top_lending_protocols.name: Maple
top_lending_protocols.description: Maple Finance is an institutional capital marketplace powered by blockchain technology.

top_lending_protocols.name: Kamino Lend
top_lending_protocols.description: Kamino Lend (K-Lend) is a novel peer-to-pool borrowing primitive designed as foundational infrastructure to power complex financial products with leverage and automation and as a decentralized matchmaker between borrowers and lenders
top_lending_protocols.methodology: TVL consists of deposits made to the protocol, and borrowed tokens are counted.

top_lending_protocols.name: Compound V3
top_lending_protocols.description: Compound is an algorithmic, autonomous interest rate protocol built for developers, to unlock a universe of open financial applications.
top_lending_protocols.methodology: Counts the tokens locked in the contracts to be used as collateral to borrow or to earn yield. Borrowed coins are not counted towards the TVL, so only the coins actually locked in the contracts are counted. There's multiple reasons behind this but one of the main ones is to avoid inflating the TVL through cycled lending.. TVL is calculated by getting the market addresses from comptroller and calling the totalsCollaterals() on-chain method to get the amount of tokens locked in each of these addresses, then we get the price of each token from coingecko.

top_lending_protocols.name: Venus Core Pool
top_lending_protocols.description: A Decentralized Marketplace for Lenders and Borrowers with Borderless Stablecoins.

top_lending_protocols.name: Jupiter Lend
top_lending_protocols.description: Jupiter Lend is Jupiter's DeFi platform for lending and borrowing crypto

top_lending_protocols.name: Lista Lending
top_lending_protocols.description: Lista Lending is a decentralized P2P lending protocol on BNB Chain that uses a vault-based system to pool liquidity and allocate it across lending markets based on supply and demand.
top_lending_protocols.methodology: TVL counts the tokens locked in the protocol's vaults. Smart Lending swap pool liquidity is tracked separately in lista-dex.
